title: hieracium stelligerum subsp. girerdii
intro: Hieracium stelligerum subsp. girerdii is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae), also known as a hawkweed, specifically native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium stelligerum subsp. girerdii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal usage.
